# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom build command')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Test script to run after build')
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Deployment command to execute')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                sh "echo Build started\n${params.CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMAND}"
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                branch 'master' // or any other condition based on your needs
            }
            steps {
                sh "${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                branch 'master' // or any other condition based on your needs
            }
            steps {
                sh "${params.DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND}"
            }
        }
    }
}
